_README: Manual no-program overrides. Takes precedence over coachesScraped.json status. Used by schoolMatcher to drop schools that don't field a varsity program of a given gender, in cases where the scraper produced a false positive (e.g. Alabama mens, where the women's head coach was mis-scraped into the men's slot). Format: '<schoolId>:<gender>': true. To re-enable a school, set the value to false or remove the key. Add a brief reason as a sibling _reason key (optional, for documentation).
_reason_alabama:mens: SEC — no men's varsity soccer. Scraper picked up Ashley Johnston (women's head coach) as the men's coach.
_reason_tennessee:mens: SEC — no men's varsity soccer. Scraper found a performance staffer, not a coach.
_reason_lsu:mens: SEC — no men's varsity soccer (already 'no-program' in scrape; redundant safety).
_reason_texas:mens: Big 12 — no men's varsity soccer (UT Austin).
_reason_oklahoma:mens: Big 12 — no men's varsity soccer (OU Norman).
_reason_minnesota:mens: Big Ten — no men's varsity soccer.
_reason_purdue:mens: Big Ten — no men's varsity soccer.
_reason_iowa:mens: Big Ten — no men's varsity soccer (already 'no-program' in scrape; redundant safety).
_reason_illinois:mens: Big Ten — no men's varsity soccer.
_reason_georgia-tech:mens: ACC — no men's varsity soccer. Scraper email-inferred a fabricated coach name (Albert Demerit) from the email format heuristic.
_reason_utah:mens: Big 12 / Pac-12 — no men's varsity soccer (women's only). Scraper picked up the women's head coach (Carly Dockendorf) for the men's slot.
_reason_byu:mens: Big 12 — no men's varsity soccer (program dropped in 2014). Scraper resolved to a club-team coach.
_reason_miami:mens: ACC — no men's varsity soccer (women's only). Status was 'failed' so the scraper didn't surface a no-program signal.
